page_metadata.biotools__summary: The Cancer Genome Atlas (TCGA) Data Portal provides a platform for researchers to search, download, and analyze data sets generated by TCGA. It contains clinical information, genomic characterization data and high level sequence analysis of the tumor genomes.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: The Cancer Genome Atlas (TCGA) Data Portal provides a platform for researchers to search, download, and analyze data sets generated by TCGA. It contains clinical information, genomic characterization data and high level sequence analysis of the tumor genomes.
